items.title: Drop-in visits
items.description: A 30-minute check-in for feeding, fresh water, playtime, and a potty break. Perfect for cats and independent dogs.

items.title: Dog walks
items.description: 30 or 60 minute leashed walks tailored to your dog's pace. Treats, water, and tail wags included.

items.title: Overnight sitting
items.description: I stay in your home overnight so your pets keep their routine and their favorite spot on the couch.

items.title: Cat care
items.description: Litter, food, fresh water, brushing, and as much (or as little) lap time as your cat will allow.

items.title: Medication administration
items.description: Pills, drops, injections, and special diets handled with patience and care for senior or medically fragile pets.

items.title: Horse care & exercise
items.description: Feeding, watering, turnout, stall cleaning, blanketing, and exercise rides or lunging. I grew up around horses and am comfortable with most temperaments.
